LanguageData.nanorecreate.label: <color=#C0C0C0>eternal recreation</color>
LanguageData.nanorecreate.description: Countless glitter tech nanomachines flow through the body, redefining the boundaries of life itself. Every cell evolves to perfection under mechanical consciousness guidance, pain becomes a distant memory, and death merely a reversible concept. The host has transcended mortal flesh, becoming an eternal existence of perfect fusion between technology and biology.
LanguageData.bravesoul.label: <color=#00CED1>immortal soul</color>
LanguageData.bravesoul.description: An immortal warrior's spirit burns within, forged through countless battlefields. Death itself bends to their indomitable will, and their combat prowess transcends mortal limitations. The trials of blood and fire have crystallized into eternal strength, and protecting others is the ultimate meaning of their existence.
LanguageData.pioneerspirit.label: <color=#87CEEB>pioneer spirit</color>
LanguageData.pioneerspirit.description: The essence of exploration and discovery flows through their veins. Born to chart the unknown, they possess an otherworldly connection to the wilderness and an innate mastery over all forms of labor and combat. Every uncharted world becomes humanity's new home under their guidance - pioneering is their destiny.
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.label: <color=#646464>adaptive armor</color>
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.description: Advanced adaptive armor that responds to the health condition. As health decreases, the armor becomes more protective but restricts movement. Nanoscale actuators analyze threat levels and automatically adjust defensive parameters.
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.stages.0.label: adaptive armor (active)
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.stages.1.label: adaptive armor (alert)
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.stages.2.label: adaptive armor (defensive)
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.stages.3.label: adaptive armor (emergency)
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.stages.4.label: adaptive armor (fortress)
LanguageData.transcendence_battle_morph_verbs.label: nanite battle protocol
LanguageData.transcendence_battle_morph_verbs.descrip: A standing nanite combat protocol derived from glitterworld battlefield doctrine. It does not replace natural limbs; instead, it overlays battle-prosthetic motion patterns through the neural lattice and continuously grants six melee maneuvers: phase cleave, kinetic ram, vector thrust, needle rake, heel spike, and sweeping kick.
LanguageData.bravesoul_cognitive.label: cognitive fervor
LanguageData.bravesoul_cognitive.description: Sharpened mind and heightened perception fueled by warrior spirit.
LanguageData.bravesoul_physical.label: physical might
LanguageData.bravesoul_physical.description: Unmatched agility and control honed through countless battles.
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.label: vital ascendance
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.stages.0.label: vital ascendance (stable)
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.stages.1.label: vital ascendance (awakened)
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.stages.2.label: vital ascendance (surging)
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.stages.3.label: vital ascendance (frenzy)
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.stages.4.label: vital ascendance (undying)
LanguageData.bravesoul_combat.label: combat mastery
LanguageData.bravesoul_combat.description: Supreme martial prowess and adaptive defenses.
LanguageData.bravesoul_spirit.label: indomitable spirit
LanguageData.bravesoul_spirit.description: Unbreakable resolve that steadies the mind in the face of death.
LanguageData.pioneerspirit_physical.label: frontier vigor
LanguageData.pioneerspirit_physical.description: Refined physicality for exploration and hauling.
LanguageData.pioneerspirit_industry.label: pioneer industry
LanguageData.pioneerspirit_combat.label: frontier marksmanship
LanguageData.pioneerspirit_resilience.label: survival instinct
LanguageData.WorkGuidance.label: work guidance
LanguageData.WorkGuidance.description: After receiving precise guidance on work details and steps, work proficiency improves noticeably and learning accelerates sharply for a short time.
LanguageData.WorkMotivation.label: united as one
LanguageData.WorkMotivation.description: Galvanized by the colony mobilization call, this pawn works shoulder to shoulder with their comrades, throwing themselves into every task with exceptional drive and focus. The effect fades after one day.
